details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory under reports/.
reports/board/ directory missing — governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to exist.

moltbot/ directory still exists with active Python code: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py. Additionally, scripts reference moltbot/clawdbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. alpaca_codebase_payload.txt also references moltbot. These are code/config references, not documentation of removal.
